title: SLE Connector Options
text: SLE Connector Options You can assign connector options by setting USYS$SLE_PARAMS in the [DRIVER_SETTINGS] section of the assignment file. USYS$SLE_PARAMS Option { , Option n} Options checks create db default locking identifiers maxlockwait step size Description Each assignment can be no longer than one line in the assignment file. For all options, the default action is used by the connector unless specifically overridden by using the appropriate parameter. All options have the form Directive = Value . Instead of the equal sign (=), a colon can be used. Multiple settings can be concatenated by comma-separating options. For example: [DRIVER_SETTINGS] USYS$SLE_PARAMS = default locking: cautious, step size = off Copy Related Links [DRIVER_SETTINGS] Use the [DRIVER_SETTINGS] section of the assignment file to specify the database and component engine connectors used, and their parameter options. The options available depend on the connector in use. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
